title: ManifestRecord
description: Canonical manifest business object as stored in PostgreSQL and returned by the dashboard API (ICD-6/ICD-7). Represents an operator-uploaded creative manifest at any point in its approval lifecycle.

manifest_id.description: Business-level manifest identifier. Used by decision-optimizer and player to reference the manifest. Must be unique per tenant/site.

title.description: Human-readable name for the manifest shown in the dashboard.

status.description: Approval lifecycle state. See state machine in README.

schema_version.description: ICD-5 schema version of the manifest_json payload.

manifest_json.description: The raw ICD-5 creative manifest object as supplied by the operator. Null when returned in list views for bandwidth efficiency.

rejection_reason.description: Free-text reason supplied by the operator when rejecting a manifest.

approved_by.description: Identifier of the actor who approved the manifest (operator label, future auth subject).

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of most recent approval.

enabled_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when manifest was most recently enabled for playback.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of record creation.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of last modification.
